_instructions: 50 proven hook templates to adapt — never copy verbatim. Each template has a blank to fill with your topic, audience, or specific result. The goal is to find the hook type that fits the content, then write a version in the creator's voice.

hook_types.fact_bomb: A verifiable, counter-intuitive statement that creates cognitive dissonance. Highest performing for B2B/founder audiences.
hook_types.specific_claim: A concrete number, time, or result that earns skepticism and demands proof.
hook_types.direct_challenge: A provocation that names the specific audience and challenges a belief they hold.
hook_types.pattern_interrupt: Subverts category expectations in the first word or phrase.
hook_types.story_open: Drops into the middle of a real moment — not 'here's what I learned' but 'I was in the middle of X when...'
hook_types.consequence_hook: Stakes-forward. Makes the reader feel what happens if they don't keep reading.
hook_types.counterintuitive: Challenges what the audience already believes with evidence.

hooks.template: This one [content-type] contains more knowledge than a [degree/course/book]
If you're a [specific person] and you [struggle with specific problem], this will either piss you off or make your day
If you're looking to [lose all your results], here are the [X] worst ways to [action]
I'm really hope I'm not the first person to tell you this, but...
There's 1 thing you can do to make your [thing] [X] times better and it only takes [X] minutes
The greatest [niche] cheat code just dropped — you're never missing your [result] after this
Here's a [X]-minute thing that will drastically improve [specific outcome]
People will gatekeep really good [topic] by making it sound complicated — let me simplify it
The biggest green flag that you're going to [achieve result] is you're focused on this [one thing]
I love [topic] but [common aspect] kind of sucks — here are [X] things I do to make it work
[X]% of [result] depends on this one thing
If you can't [achieve result], it's not because you're not [positive trait] — it's because you don't know how to [action]
I [did action] every day for [X] days. Here's what actually happened.
If I woke up [in undesirable state] tomorrow and wanted to [get result] by [timeframe], here's exactly what I'd do
There's one [habit/mistake] silently destroying your [result], and it has nothing to do with [obvious cause]
There's absolutely no reason to be [doing common action] every day just because you think you have to [achieve goal]
Here's what [elite people in the space] don't want you to know about [topic]
If you're going to [achieve result], it's not going to come from [popular method] — and that's something people don't get
If you skip this one step in [process], you're going to mess up [important outcome]
A [credible source] just found that [surprising finding] — but here's what they didn't tell you
I don't know who needs to hear this, but your [thing] isn't [working] because your [specific element] is broken
Here's how I make my [affordable/simple thing] produce results like [expensive/complex thing]
I probably shouldn't be giving this away for free — here's how to [desirable outcome] in under [X] using [method]
[X] years of [topic]. I'm going to give you the [X] most important lessons in [timeframe]
This is how to [desirable goal] without [doing the difficult or sacrificial thing everyone assumes is required]
The easiest way to [cause negative outcome] is to [common action people don't think is harmful]
What if you could [do small action] and [multiply your results]? Let me show you
In the next [X] seconds, I'm going to show you how to [desirable specific outcome]
Here's how you turn [small thing] into [bigger thing]
[X] [things in your niche] you're sleeping on. Wake up.
Here's a decade of [niche] lessons, summarised in 60 seconds
The reason you can't [create desirable result] is because [honest, direct diagnosis]
Don't tell me [common excuse]
You don't need [positive trait everyone assumes is required] to [achieve desirable outcome]
Nobody tells you this about [topic] — they just make it sound hard to gatekeep it
What if I told you [small overlooked thing] could [significant measurable result]
This is how to turn your [current state] into a [desired outcome] machine
Everyone tells you to [popular advice]. Nobody shows you how. Here's [X]-step version you can save.
Remember [simple counterintuitive rule] for your next [activity]
Here's the one thing that [high performers] do completely differently to everyone else
It takes [X] hours per week to completely change your [result] — I'll prove it in [timeframe]
It took me [X] years to master [skill]. Here are the [X] most important lessons in [timeframe].
Here's a dirty little secret [experts in your space] don't want you to know
[X] [types of content/approach] that rarely fail — steal their framework
For the love of [expression], whatever you do in [situation], don't forget [overlooked specific thing]
Do you want [popular framing of desire] — or do you want [what they actually need]?
I'm going to take you from [beginner state] to [expert state] with [X]-step framework
One of the biggest myths in [niche] is [popular belief people take for granted]
I've spent [X hours/months] testing [approaches]. Don't waste your time — here are the [X] that actually [deliver result]
I've consumed over [X] [content pieces] on [topic]. [X]% pretty useless. But [small number] permanently changed how I think about it.
